Usage: gaia search lkm knowledge [OPTIONS] QUERY

 Search LKM paper knowledge items (POST /search).

в•°в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв•Ҝ

 Use this surface when you need LKM-grounded paper knowledge items: conclusion
 claims, weak-point / highlight claims, problems, and open questions from
 papers. `reasoning <query>` is a parallel search surface for reasoning chains
 and workflows, not a later phase of knowledge search.
 For paper conclusions you plan to audit, use --scopes conclusion.
 --reasoning-only remains a legacy alias for claim searches that only want
 reasoning-backed conclusions. If a hit has a claim id, --claim-id can fetch
 that claim's supporting reasoning graph.
 Default search uses hybrid retrieval and comprehensive ranking. Add --keywords
 for lexical recall; use --sort-by recent or --sort-by journal when freshness
 or venue should dominate the first page.
 Use --scopes abstract for paper-level abstract hits. Treat abstracts as paper
 context, not Gaia claims; same-paper `related` hits are folded context, not
 cross-paper recommendations.
 API docs:
 https://s.apifox.cn/<UUID4>/api-459806352
 Endpoint links: gaia search lkm docs
 Note: `score` / `rerank_score` are retrieval ranking signals, not
 probabilities вҖ” do not pass to Gaia priors.
